description.value:
The corruption-clock carrier for @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-items.Item.crownOfFangs0001]{The Crown of Fangs}: a non-Ileosa wearer attempts @Check[type:will|dc:40] per week worn or the whispers take root — the soul-seed of Kazavon begins the campaign's horror over again in a new vessel.

Apply this effect to any non-Ileosa creature that invests the crown; tick the badge up each week worn (it tracks failed saves at the GM's preference). The second soul grows with every day worn and every death defied. The crown's own @Check[type:will|dc:42] dominate (3/day) and its sunder profile live on the item doc.

publication.title: Pathfinder: Curse of the Crimson Throne (PF2e conversion, private)
